summary: All requirements have been implemented. The diff shows a functional case converter tool with a text input area, uppercase and lowercase conversion buttons, and a clean, modern centered design. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Character counter displaying the number of characters in the text area
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention any character counting functionality, but the implementation includes a character counter below the textarea showing the text length

hallucinated_features.description: Disabled state for buttons when text is empty
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify that buttons should be disabled when the text area is empty. The implementation includes disabled logic on both conversion buttons

hallucinated_features.description: Header with logo icon and subtitle
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention a header with logo or subtitle. The implementation includes a sticky header with a Type icon, title, and subtitle text

hallucinated_features.description: Footer with copyright notice and caffeine.ai attribution link
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention a footer with copyright or attribution. The implementation includes a footer with copyright year and a link to caffeine.ai

hallucinated_features.description: Card-based layout with CardHeader, CardTitle, and CardDescription components
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies centered layout but does not mention using a card-based component structure. The implementation wraps content in Card components
The BuildRequest does not specify button icons. The implementation adds ArrowUp and ArrowDown icons to the conversion buttons
The BuildRequest explicitly lists user authentication as a non-goal, but the implementation includes InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, and useActor hook for authentication
